chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5806 - اِرْحَمْ مَنْ فِي اَلْأَرْضِ يَرْحَمْكَ مَنْ فِي اَلسَّمَاءِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5806 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Show mercy to those on the earth, and the One (Allah (swt)) in the heavens will show mercy to you."
